summary: Loading state displays correctly with proper heading and loading indicators, but uses generic dark UI palette instead of the required diner brand aesthetic for authenticated surfaces.

violations.description: Admin interface uses dark neutral palette (#1a1a1a background, generic grays) instead of required diner palette surfaces like teal #9fd8d2 or cream #fff8ea
Authenticated admin surface shows visual divergence from public brand treatment, using generic dark UI system instead of coherent diner brand palette

actions: Apply diner brand palette to admin interface background and surfaces
Replace dark neutral colors with cream (#fff8ea) or appropriate diner palette colors
Ensure admin chrome maintains visual consistency with public marketing surfaces
